title: languas vanoverberghii
intro: Languas vanoverberghii, also known as the Van Overbergh's tongue plant, is a species of flowering plant in the ginger family, native to the Philippines. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Languas vanoverberghii include reducing fever, relieving pain, and treating respiratory infections. The plant is often prepared in herbal remedies, such as decoctions and infusions, which can be used to treat a variety of ailments.
